description: Activation du mode Cockpit sur XRoads. Lecture du contexte projet, délibération Chairman via cockpit-council, assignation des slots avec MetierSkill. Gestion du cycle de vie CockpitSession.
goals: Implémenter la persistance SQLite de CockpitSession et AgentSlot
Implémenter le Conductor : lecture contexte projet → appel cockpit-council → slot assignment
Implémenter le cycle de vie CockpitLifecycle complet (idle → initializing → active → paused → closed)
Exposer le bouton Cockpit Mode dans l'UI XRoads avec feedback visuel séquentiel de démarrage

user_stories.title: CockpitSession persistence layer (SQLite)
user_stories.description: As an orchestrator, I need CockpitSession and AgentSlot persisted in SQLite so that cockpit state survives app restarts and is queryable.
acceptance_criteria: CockpitSession table created with all schema attributes
AgentSlot table created with FK to CockpitSession (cascade delete)
One active CockpitSession max per project_path (unique index enforced)
CRUD operations available via CockpitSessionRepository actor

tests.desc: Should keep AgentSlot linked to CockpitSession with cascade delete
Should block AgentSlot provisioning if no skill assigned

unit_test.name: test_cockpit_session_persistence
unit_test.description: Validates SQLite persistence of CockpitSession and AgentSlot with cascade
assertions: should create CockpitSession and persist to SQLite
should cascade delete slots on session removal

user_stories.technical_notes: Use GRDB.swift for SQLite. Actor-based CockpitSessionRepository. Schema migration versioned.

user_stories.title: Project context reader for Chairman deliberation
user_stories.description: As the Conductor, I need to read the project context (git log, PRD actif, issues ouvertes, dernière session) and package it for cockpit-council Chairman deliberation.
acceptance_criteria: ProjectContextReader reads git log (last 20 commits), active PRD JSON, open branches
CockpitSession transitions from idle to initializing on activation
Activation blocked if no valid git repo at project_path (guard: has_valid_project)

tests.desc: Should transition CockpitSession from idle to initializing on valid project
Should block activation if project_path has no git repo

unit_test.name: test_project_context_reader
unit_test.description: Validates context reading and CockpitLifecycle activation
assertions: should read git log and package as ChairmanInput
should transition to initializing on valid project
should reject activation on invalid project path

user_stories.technical_notes: ProjectContextReader as Swift actor. ChairmanInput: Codable struct with gitLog, prdSummary, openBranches, lastSession.

user_stories.title: Conductor — Chairman output to slot assignment
user_stories.description: As the Conductor, I need to send ChairmanInput to cockpit-council, receive the Chairman synthesis, and assign MetierSkill to each AgentSlot based on the decision.
acceptance_criteria: CockpitCouncilClient sends ChairmanInput to cockpit-council Python library
Chairman output parsed into SlotAssignment array (slot_index, skill_name, agent_type, branch, task_description)
AgentSlot records created and persisted for each assignment
CockpitSession transitions from initializing to active (guard: at_least_one_slot_configured)
Slots light up sequentially in UI (not all at once)

tests.desc: Should transition CockpitSession from initializing to active when slots assigned
Should block transition if no slot is configured
Should keep AgentSlot linked to CockpitSession

unit_test.name: test_conductor_slot_assignment
unit_test.description: Validates Conductor Chairman integration and slot assignment
assertions: should call cockpit-council with ChairmanInput and receive SlotAssignment
should create AgentSlot records from SlotAssignment
should transition session to active after assignment
should reject if no slots assigned

user_stories.technical_notes: CockpitCouncilClient wraps cockpit-council via Python subprocess or HTTP. SlotAssignment: Codable. Sequential slot startup with 500ms delay between each for cinematic effect.

user_stories.title: Cockpit Mode UI — activation button and session status display
user_stories.description: As a user, I need a Cockpit Mode button in XRoads that activates the session and shows real-time status of each slot during initialization and runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Cockpit Mode toggle button visible in XRoads toolbar
Activation triggers sequential slot startup with visual animation per slot
Each slot card shows: skill name, agent type, status badge, current_task live
Pause / Resume / Close controls available for the entire session
CockpitSession pause transitions all slots to paused state

tests.desc: Should transition CockpitSession to paused when pause triggered from UI
Should transition CockpitSession back to active on resume

unit_test.name: test_cockpit_mode_ui_lifecycle
unit_test.description: Validates Cockpit Mode UI state transitions and slot display
assertions: should show Cockpit button in toolbar
should update slot card status in real-time
should pause all slots on session pause

user_stories.technical_notes: CockpitModeView as SwiftUI view. @Observable CockpitViewModel drives state. Animation: withAnimation(.spring) on each slot card appearance.

functional_requirements.description: Une seule CockpitSession active par project_path à tout moment
Les slots s'allument séquentiellement, pas tous simultanément
Le Conductor ne démarre pas si cockpit-council est indisponible
Tous les changements d'état passent par les machines CockpitLifecycle et AgentSlotLifecycle

technical_considerations: cockpit-council appelé via subprocess Python ou HTTP local
Nexus Loop compatible : prd.json référencé par le loop script
success_metrics: CockpitSession persiste et se recharge après restart app
Chairman délibère et assigne les slots en moins de 10 secondes
100% des stories avec touches et transition renseignés
